name: Info Yatirim Menkul Degerler A.S.
summary: Info Yatirim Menkul Degerler A.S. operates in the field of capital market in Turkey. The company provides investment consultancy, portfolio management, and corporate finance services to individual and institutional investors, as well as the brokerage of capital market instruments; and brokerage services in the equity market, debt securities market, and futures and options market. It also offers stocks and VIOP, forex trading, and option transaction services. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
